name: Adjudicator

recommended.why: Adjudicator's shields and defensive abilities scale exceptionally well with Health and survivability. Fury of Blood maximizes her durability, allowing her to absorb damage and protect the team throughout every stage of the game.

investment.why: Adjudicator is one of the strongest frontline tanks for League teams. She remains relevant throughout the entire game and scales extremely well with higher investment.

description: A durable frontline tank who excels at protecting allies with powerful defensive abilities, shields, and exceptional survivability.
